nasb.text: Samson said to them, “Since you act like this, I will surely take revenge on you, but after that I will quit.”

esv.text: And Samson said to them, “If this is what you do, I swear I will be avenged on you, and after that I will quit.”

cnv.text: 參孫對他們說：“你們既然這樣行，我必在你們身上報仇，然後才肯罷休。”

ccb.text: 参孙说：“你们既然这样做，我不向你们报仇誓不罢休。”
